lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Adder ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Adder shipyard page — hull stats, module sellers, tech brokers, and material traders.

sources.label: Fandom
sources.what: Adder lore, manufacturer, and role overview backing the dossier write-up.

sources.label: YouTube — TheYamiks
sources.what: Opinionated review of the Adder, covering the budget Zorgon Peterson all-rounder's character, handling and value over the Sidewinder.
